params.TriggerDescription: When you planeswalk to CARDNAME or at the beginning of your upkeep, select target player at random. That player discards a card. If that player discards a land card this way, they lose 3 life.
When you planeswalk to CARDNAME or at the beginning of your upkeep, select target player at random. That player discards a card. If that player discards a land card this way, they lose 3 life.
Whenever chaos ensues, you may destroy target nonland permanent.
